title: Cobblemon Botany Pot Integration
description: A quick and dirty datapack that allows Cobblemon crops to be farmed in Botany Pots
body:
## A quick and dirty datapack that allows Cobblemon crops to be farmed in Botany Pots. For Minecraft 1.21.1

![Some of the plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc9bc60004d93f79f14e407e9e8b0ddc24b181c9_0.webp)

# Plants supported: ### Berries

![Planting berries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9cac096ba8b78ccc414b812929526fecc7e6d02.png)

Berries can only be planted on farmland. You may obtain farmland via other mods if you have them; or if you don't, simply right click a botany pot that contains a dirt with a hoe to turn it into farmland. All cobblemon berries are supported. Mutation is not possible. Using Mulch is not possible. ### Mint

![Planting mint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9968a32e323c6c069c83d6ef5040875d79ff95dc.png)

Mint of all color can be planted on dirt or farmland. Note that White Mint will not drop seeds of other colors. ### Medicinal Leeks

![Planting medicinal leeks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e679468de9867b25959df914059711d07d86a15.png)

Medicinal looks can be planted in water. ### Roots

![Planting roots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34001cb6219ec9050c37d4fce77f005e5748b774.png)

Big Root and Energy Root can be planted on dirt or stone. Both of them produce 75% Big Root and 25% Energy Root. ### Revival Herbs

![Planting revival herbs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65a1b4b8b1bcbe5e0fc59e9a57a04a5b37b653e3.png)

Revival Herbs can be planted on dirt or farmland. They also produce Pep Up Flowers. Mutation is not possible. ### Vivichokes

![Planting vivichokes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626cbe205c0ee2ad69d1ff49ef0db8b3a2204fd8.png)

Vivichokes can be planted on dirt or farmland. ### Apricorns There are 2 ways for farming apricorns:

![Planting apricorns on leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d62ea71661e9f5486401853b88bef77990a71133.png)

Apricorns can be planted on apricorn leaves. This produces apricorns and sprouts.

![Planting sprouts on soil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18694ef78d94ce6565489dcc597070a995754989.png)

![Getting leaves with shears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ad5657fb6b5c08522dedd0974998849465379d.png)

Alternatively, sprouts can be planted on dirt or farmland. This grows much slower and produces less apricorns and sprouts, but it also produces apricorn logs. In addition, you can also farm apricorn leaves using shears. This feature may or may not work without Botany Trees. If this is not working for you, try installing Botany Trees. ### Beans

![Planting beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a117f836d109b03c7d15c7ea6bded55725d1ce6e.png)

Beans from CobbleCuisine is also supported. It can be planted on dirt or farmland. It yields all bean colors.

### Do not expect long term support for this datapack. Barring critical bug fixes, this datapack will likely not recieve any updates.
